scripts.build: node scripts/check-build-env.js && node scripts/generate-public-seo.js && vite build
scripts.check:quality: npm run check:locales && npm run typecheck && npm --prefix functions run build && npm run build
scripts.verify:harness: npm run check:quality && npm run verify:expect && npm run verify:fandom && npm run verify:applixir && npm run verify:league && npm run verify:gameplay
scripts.verify:fandom: npx -y tsx scripts/verify-fandom-config.mjs && node scripts/verify-fandom-content.mjs && node scripts/verify-fandom-browser.mjs
